welcome: Aegiro is local-only. Your files never leave this Mac. No cloud. No tracking.
quantum_note: Backups use post-quantum cryptography to protect against future decryption.
passphrase_warning: There is no server recovery. If you lose your passphrase, we cannot unlock your vault.
touch_id: Touch ID unlocks the vault on this device only. It never sends your data anywhere.
backup_tip: Export an encrypted backup and store it offline. You’ll need your passphrase to open it.
